data.title: Cytokinetics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(C)(4)
data.description: Cytokinetics, Incorporated disclosed on April 20, 2026, that they have provided stock options for the acquisition of 49,358 common shares and 32,734 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 33 recently onboarded employees. The employees, who joined in March and April 2026, were granted these incentives as part of their employment agreement.

data.title: Carlyle Credit Income Fund Schedules Second Quarter Financial Results and Investor Conference Call
data.description: Carlyle Credit Income Fund, also known as CCIF and listed on NYSE as CCIF, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, post market closure. Following this disclosure, the company will conduct a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EST on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, to further elaborate on the results.

data.title: FibroBiologics Compliant with All Nasdaq Listing Requirements
data.description: On April 20, 2026, FibroBiologics, Inc. (Nasdaq: FBLG), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm, shared that it has 270+ patents issued and pending. The company focuses on creating therapeutics and potential cures for chronic illnesses using fibroblasts and related materials. The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC has verified FibroBiologics' compliance with all relevant criteria for staying listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market. This includes meeting the $2.5 million stockholders’ equity criterion and the $1.00 bid price requirement.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics Announces Proposed Public Offering
data.description: In San Francisco today, a biotechnology company known as Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) revealed their launch of an underwritten public offering totaling $250 million. The company, specializing in immunotherapy medicines, is in the clinical stage of development.
Flywire will report Q1 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026.

data.title: Allegiant Announces Future Board Composition Following Sun Country Acquisition
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company has revealed the expected composition of its Board of Directors after acquiring Sun Country Airlines. Following the acquisition, the Allegiant Board will increase in size from eight members to eleven. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026, through a press release. Allegiant Travel Company is listed on the NASDAQ with the ticker symbol ALGT, while Sun Country Airlines is also traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol SNCY. This move marks a significant development within the airline industry, signaling growth and potential strategic realignment.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- GLD/
data.description: GLD and Tempter are collaborating on a special limited-edition 4/20 collection, combining luxury jewelry with THC beverage culture. The launch took place on April 20, 2026. The press release initially distributed contained errors, and here is the revised version with more information.

data.title: Vestibular Therapy: Regaining Balance After Dizziness or Concussion Explained in HelloNation Featuring Physical Therapy Expert Jeff Kessler
data.description: A recent report discusses the benefits of structured vestibular therapy in aiding individuals to decrease dizziness, enhance stability, and facilitate concussion healing. The program has shown promising results, helping individuals regain balance and reduce lingering symptoms post-injury. The therapy has notably assisted many in improving their overall quality of life and daily functionality. It emphasizes the importance of proper treatment and rehabilitation techniques, showcasing a significant reduction in symptoms in patients who actively engage in the program. This approach has been particularly effective in reducing post-injury dizziness and instability, demonstrating an increase in success rates by 40% in supporting concussion recovery. Such therapy plays a critical role in addressing the persistent feelings of unsteadiness that some individuals may experience even after the initial injury or dizziness has subsided.

data.title: miraDry® Reports 55% Growth in Patient Spend, Significantly Outpacing Aesthetic Energy-Based Device Market, and Kicks Off Odor Awareness Week
data.description: In San Jose, California, on April 20, 2026, miraDry, Inc. revealed a significant expansion in its non-surgical underarm sweat and odor reduction services. The company reported a substantial 55% rise in patient expenditures and a 43% surge in total treatments during the first quarter of 2026, as contrasted with the same period in 2025.

data.title: VERSABANK HAS BEGUN RECEIVING QCAD DEPOSITS UNDER STABLECOIN CUSTODY SERVICES AGREEMENT AND CONGRATULATES STABLECORP ON LISTING OF QCAD ON KRAKEN
data.description: VersaBank, a prominent North American business-to-business digital banking institution renowned for its technology solutions in cybersecurity, disclosed today in London, ON, on April 20, 2026, that it is now accepting deposits in QCAD. The Bank, identified as VersaBank (TSX: VBNK) (NASDAQ: VBNK), is a leading player in the industry, offering innovative digital banking services.

data.title: New Autism Therapy Clinic for Young Children Opens its Doors in Sheboygan Falls
data.description: In SHEBOYGAN, Wisconsin, a ribbon-cutting event will be held on April 21, 2026, by Caravel Autism Health, a prominent figure in diagnosing and treating young children with autism. They are opening a cutting-edge autism therapy clinic.

data.title: IBA – ACQUISITION OF OWN SHARES
data.description: On April 20th, 2026, at 9 PM CEST in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, Ion Beam Applications SA ("IBA") released details regarding its share repurchase initiative as per article 8:4 of the Royal Decree dated April 29, 2019, implementing the Belgian Code on Companies and Associations. The share buyback program was initially unveiled on February 2nd, 2026.

data.title: Rochford Orthodontics Announces Rebrand, Honoring a Legacy of Excellence Since 1965
data.description: Indianapolis, April 20, 2026 - Rochford Orthodontics has officially rebranded from Glander Rochford Orthodontics, a renowned orthodontic practice established in 1965. The transition represents a new chapter for the company while preserving its longstanding commitment to orthodontic excellence. With over sixty years of experience in the field, Rochford Orthodontics looks forward to continuing its tradition of providing quality orthodontic care to patients.

data.title: AdvisorShares Applauds Executive Order Accelerating Access to Psychedelic Therapies
data.description: The portfolio manager overseeing the AdvisorShares Psychedelics ETF (PSIL) described the executive action as a crucial milestone for psychedelic medicine. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026, in Bethesda, Maryland. AdvisorShares is known for managing actively traded ETFs and highlighted the significance of this development.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips, But Cruise Stock Shows Strength; These Stocks Clear Entry Points (Live Coverage)
data.description: Following an address by President Trump regarding Iran, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline. Nvidia and Amazon both underperformed in today's stock market. However, a cruise stock demonstrated growth. The overall stock market performance today revealed a dip in the Dow Jones index, while specific stocks like the cruise stock showed resilience and promising growth potential, offering clear entry points for investors.
